mapper.select: SELECT tp.permission_code FROM tb_user u JOIN tb_user_role tur ON u.id = tur.user_id JOIN tb_role tr ON tr.role_id = tur.role_id JOIN tb_role_permission trp ON trp.role_id = tr.role_id JOIN tb_permission tp ON tp.id = trp.permission_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} and tp.permission_type = 'button'

SELECT tp.id, tp.key, tp.label, tp.icon, tp.parent_id,tp.sort FROM tb_user u JOIN tb_user_role tur ON u.id = tur.user_id JOIN tb_role tr ON tr.role_id = tur.role_id JOIN tb_role_permission trp ON trp.role_id = tr.role_id JOIN tb_permission tp ON tp.id = trp.permission_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND tp.permission_type = 'menu'
